clinicalProblem.clinicalIntent: Identify clinical features that suggest underlying secondary causes of hypertension
clinicalProblem.whenToUse: Initial hypertension evaluation, medication-resistant hypertension, atypical presentation
clinicalProblem.decisionOrAction: Determine need for secondary hypertension screening + referral pathway

navigationPath.purpose: Entry point for secondary hypertension screening
Display checklist of 12 secondary HTN features
User selects which features apply to patient
Process YES/NO based on feature presence
If NO → determine screening test result
If positive screening test → refer to specialist
If negative screening test → enhance medication therapy

options: Disproportionate TOD for degree of HTN
Onset of diastolic HTN in older adults (age ≥65 y)

validationRules: At least one feature required if hasSecondaryFeatures == true
Screening test result required only if hasSecondaryFeatures == false

rules: Check patient against 12 secondary HTN features
If ANY feature present → hasSecondaryFeatures = YES
If NO features present → hasSecondaryFeatures = NO
If YES → Screen for primary aldosteronism and other secondary forms of HTN
If NO → Check screening test result
If screening test positive → Refer to clinician with secondary HTN expertise
If screening test negative → Enhance medication therapy

decisionPath.action: Screen for primary aldosteronism + other secondary forms

decisionPath.condition: No features present AND screening test positive
No features present AND screening test negative

category.description: e.g., 'High Risk for Secondary HTN' / 'Low Risk for Secondary HTN'

recommendedNextStep.description: Screening pathway or referral or medication enhancement

escalationLogic.ifAnySymptomPresent: Urgent referral for secondary HTN evaluation

nextStepRouting.providerSuggestion: Refer to hypertension specialist if screening test positive or multiple high-risk features present
nextStepRouting.followUpTiming: Repeat screening annually or if treatment resistance develops
nextStepRouting.repeatMeasurement: Confirm medication adherence before labeling drug-resistant
nextStepRouting.navigatorEscalation: Flag early-onset (<30 y) or malignant HTN for expedited review
nextStepRouting.documentation: Log selected features and screening pathway decision to health record
